title: Cogni CISLF Advisor: An Open-Source Executive Assessment Tool for AI Transformation Readiness
description: Cogni CISLF Advisor is an interactive Streamlit application that operationalises the Comprehensive Intelligent Strategic Leadership Framework (CISLF) for technology executives evaluating enterprise AI transformation initiatives. It provides AI-assisted and rule-based assessment modes across four leadership pillars: Leadership Mindset and Vision, Strategic Business-Technology Alignment, Organisational Capability and Culture Building, and Responsible AI Governance.
